basics.name: Basics
basics.description: Getting started with kluster.ai: installation for supported IDEs, review modes, workflow selection, and core concepts.

ide_reviews.name: IDE Reviews
ide_reviews.description: Running code reviews inside your IDE for human-written and AI-generated code, including on-demand, background, and dependency reviews.

repo_reviews.name: Repo Reviews
repo_reviews.description: System-wide codebase analysis detecting cross-module bugs and inconsistencies, with GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket integration.

cli.name: CLI
cli.description: Terminal-based code reviews via the kluster CLI, including git hook automation, repo reviews, and CI/CD pipeline usage.

configuration.name: Configuration
configuration.description: Customizing review behavior: sensitivity levels, issue type scoping, analysis depth, custom rules, and .klusterignore patterns.

external_knowledge.name: External Knowledge
external_knowledge.description: Connecting tools like Jira so reviews can validate code against ticket requirements. Covers setup and branch naming conventions.

troubleshooting.name: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Solutions for common issues like installation errors, MCP timeouts, and cache clearing, plus FAQs on languages, IDEs, and analysis modes.

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Technical reference for MCP tools, response schema, and CLI commands with exit codes and output formatting.

pr_reviews.name: PR Reviews
pr_reviews.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai PR Reviews to automatically review pull requests on GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.
